text:
さすがだ。
この程度、おぬしには準備運動にも
ならなかったか？

……と、言うわけでもなさそうだな。
フフ、無理だと思うなら止めればいい。
それを見極めるための試練なのだから。

試練はまだまだ続く。
心折れぬ限り、挑

Impressive. That hardly qualified as a warmup
for someone of your skill, no?

I was only jesting. Heh. You're always
welcome to quit if your spirit is broken.
These trials are meant to test your limits.

There are more trials yet. Continue
challenging them as long as you as
you don't lose heart.
